actualKeyboardRoute: start slope -> zones 01-05 -> giant curve -> physical drop -> left dash run -> three jump-dash gaps -> pass 07 exit
limitations: Only zones 01 through 06 have playable collision in pass 07.
The remaining four zones are still blueprint data.
The curve corridor is reserved geometry; no boulder is active before pass 08.
The broad collapse corridor is reserved geometry; no boulder is active before pass 08.
Graybox shapes are collision prototypes, not final terrain art.
